description_long: This apartment building is a mid-rise structure with five visible floors, featuring a modern, rectangular design. The facade is primarily composed of gray brickwork, with large, evenly spaced windows and small balconies on each floor, except the ground level. The ground floor includes large glass storefront windows and a main entrance, suggesting mixed-use with possible retail or lobby space. The roof is flat and hosts two prominent, dark-colored rooftop structures, likely mechanical rooms or penthouses, separated by a central walkway. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with no windows or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, five-story apartment building with gray brick facade, large windows, and small balconies, topped by two dark rooftop structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large ground-floor windows, and symmetrical arrangement of balconies and windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain, windowless wall and the full depth of the rooftop structures.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid brick wall, no windows or balconies, and the two rooftop structures visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain wall and the depth of the rooftop structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, evenly spaced across each floor, with each window aligned directly above the one below. Balconies are present on most floors, further emphasizing the regular pattern.
